title: Verilator build phase is taking too long how to profile it
body:
For a new project,  Verilator build phase is taking too long (more than 40 minutes which is 40 times longer than what I see on even driven simulators). This is quite unusual and contrasting with my previous Verilator experience on other projects. I was wondering what the recommended approach to debug this issue would be. I would like to know which particular code block is eating up most of the time.   I have used `--prof-c` and `--prof-cfuncs` options but so far, but I only get run time profiling which is not the issue. Disabling trace does not fix the issue either. I have some delay assignments `assign #del my_sig3 = my_sig1 & my_sig2;` (and therefore need `--timing`) but even commenting out those delay does not significantly reduce the build time.  I am using the following command line (same behavior with other versions of Verilator as well).
```
(/usr/bin/time -f 'Elapsed time: %E[h:]min:sec. CPU time: user %U sys %S (%P). Peak memory: %MKB.' /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/bin/verilator --trace -cc --exe --timing --build --Mdir /var/tmp/gkamendje/verilator_work_dirs/ltag7_top/rtl/work --timing --report-unoptflat  --output-split 500000 --timescale 1ns/100ps --x-assign unique --x-initial unique    --prof-c --prof-cfuncs -f /home/gkamendje/project.repo/ltag7/ver/sim/../../rtl/man.f -f /home/gkamendje/project.repo/ltag7/ver/sim/../th/man.f --top-module ltag7_tb  /home/gkamendje/project.repo/ltag7/ver/sim/../th/verilator_wrapper.cpp) 2>&1 | tee  /var/tmp/gkamendje/verilator_work_dirs/ltag7_top/rtl/work/ltag7_top_rtl_comp.log 
make[1]: Entering directory '/var/tmp/gkamendje/verilator_work_dirs/ltag7_top/rtl/work'
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -Os -c -o verilator_wrapper.o /home/gkamendje/project.repo/ltag7/ver/sim/../th/verilator_wrapper.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -c -o verilated.o /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -c -o verilated_vcd_c.o /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -c -o verilated_timing.o /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/verilated_timing.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -c -o verilated_threads.o /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp
/usr/bin/python3 /cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vltag7_tb.cpp Vltag7_tb___024root__DepSet_h6d652bbb__0.cpp Vltag7_tb___024root__DepSet_hfbf74690__0.cpp Vltag7_tb__Trace__0.cpp Vltag7_tb__ConstPool_0.cpp Vltag7_tb___024root__Slow.cpp Vltag7_tb___024root__DepSet_h6d652bbb__0__Slow.cpp Vltag7_tb___024root__DepSet_hfbf74690__0__Slow.cpp Vltag7_tb__Syms.cpp Vltag7_tb__Trace__0__Slow.cpp > Vltag7_tb__ALL.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include -I/cad/verilator/v5.014-149-g57c816f90/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -pg  -fcoroutines -c -o Vltag7_tb__ALL.o Vltag7_tb__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vltag7_tb__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
Archive ar -rcs Vltag7_tb__ALL.a Vltag7_tb__ALL.o
g++     -pg verilator_wrapper.o verilated.o verilated_vcd_c.o verilated_timing.o verilated_threads.o Vltag7_tb__ALL.a    -pthread -lpthread -latomic   -o Vltag7_tb
rm Vltag7_tb__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
make[1]: Leaving directory '/var/tmp/gkamendje/verilator_work_dirs/ltag7_top/rtl/work'
Elapsed time: 41:52.07[h:]min:sec. CPU time: user 2505.15 sys 6.59 (99%). Peak memory: 3240144KB.
```
